title: Tip Calculator for Restaurant - Quick & Easy
description: Free tip calculator for restaurants. Calculate tip amount and split the bill among friends. Supports custom tip percentages and group splitting.
keywords: tip calculator for restaurant, restaurant tip calculator, bill splitter, tip percentage calculator, gratuity calculator
intro: Quickly calculate the tip for your restaurant bill. Choose a tip percentage and split among your group.

faq.q: How much should I tip at a restaurant?
faq.a: In the US, 15-20% is standard for sit-down restaurants. 20%+ for excellent service. 10-15% for buffets or counter service.

faq.q: Should I tip on the pre-tax or post-tax amount?
faq.a: Etiquette experts suggest tipping on the pre-tax amount, though tipping on the total is also common and appreciated.

faq.q: How do I split the tip among a group?
faq.a: Calculate the total bill plus tip, then divide by the number of people. This calculator does it automatically.
